data.text: Your property is measured with feet
Carefully selected for performance, durability and style.
A complete Premier range of inclusions to make building easy.
Inclusions that deliver exceptional value for your investment

Our Premier Inclusions Range Schedule outlines the fixtures, finishes and construction standards included as the baseline for your Project Estimate. It gives you a clear view of the quality included before your final selections are confirmed in the Formal Quotation.

Our Premier Inclusions provide the perfect balance of quality, style and value, forming the standard specification for every Project Estimate. During your Selections Process, you'll personalise your home by selecting colours, finishes and approved upgrades, with all final inclusions confirmed in your Formal Quotation before your Building Contract is prepared.
Creating homes you'll love coming home to.

The best homes are built around the people who live in them. Our Premier Inclusions provide a carefully selected range of quality fixtures, fittings and finishes, creating the perfect foundation before you personalise your home during the Selections Process.
Carefully selected fixtures, fittings and finishes.
Practical, stylish and made for everyday life.
Personalise your home with colours, finishes and upgrades.
Designed for the way you live.

Our Premier Inclusions provide the perfect balance of quality, style and value, forming the standard specification for every Project Estimate.
During your Selections Process, you'll personalise your home by selecting colours, finishes and approved upgrades, with all final inclusions confirmed in your Formal Quotation before your Building Contract is prepared.
All selections documented in your Formal Quotation.
Carefully selected products and finishes designed for quality, durability and value.
Everything required to build a quality Premier home has been included.
A balanced specification designed to deliver excellent value without compromising quality.

Site cut allowance for up to 1 metre cross fall Engineer-designed concrete waffle pod slab system with brick rebate  to suit M Class site conditions
No stepdown to garage
Termite treatment to perimeter and slab penetrations in accordance with Australian Standards

70mm T2 treated timber wall framing
T2 treated timber roof trusses designed to engineer's requirements with metal ceiling battens
Colorbond steel roofing
65mm Anticon insulation blanket beneath roof sheeting

Exposed aggregate driveway and paths
Allowance up to 60m2
Colour selected from the builder's standard range

Our Premier Inclusions Schedule outlines the fixtures, fittings, finishes and construction standards Included as the pricing basis for each Project. Each internal selection and any approved upgrades or downgrades will be confirmed during the Selections Process and documented in the Formal Quotation.

Building approvals and standard certification
Energy efficiency assessment
Builder's internal and external clean
Independent quality inspections during construction
12-month maintenance period following handover
Quality by standard, Personalised by choice.

900mm Underbench or freestanding cooker
Choice of underbench of canopy rangehood
Stainless Steel Dishwasher
Soft close doors and drawers to kitchen
Frameless mirrors standard
Semi-frameless Showerscreens standard
Flyscreens to all windows
Barrier screens to sliding doors
Wall mounted clothesline
TV Anenna
Downlights to all living rooms, bedrooms and exterior alfresco and porch
3 in 1 light/heat/fan to al bathrooms
Choice of entry door and door furniture
2 x garden taps
250l Electric Hot Water System

Create a luxurious look for your dream
kitchen, with a superb selection of
classic cabinetry, quality Blanco appliances, designer tapware and premium finishes.
CUPBOARDS
Square edge door and drawer fronts with PVC edging and selected door handles from Builders Range all with soft close options as standard.
Overhead cupboards and microwave provision.
Laminated Pantry unit (plan specific) (2100mm high) with four 5 Melamine shelves
Painted MDF bulkheads to ceiling).
600mm wide cupboards with White melamine internal linings including one (1) intermediate shelf and a bank of four (4) drawers.
Plan specific: Laminated pantry unit (2100mm high) with White melamine shelves OR Walk-In
Pantry with 5 White melamine shelves.
Laminate colours in Polytec or Laminex Smooth, Sheen, Matt, and Woodmatt finishes.
SPLASH BACK
Up to 710mm above all benchtops from standard Builders Range.
Ceramic tiles from Builders Range.
Fixed Glass Window Splash back plan specific.
FRIDGE
Water connection to fridge space standard.
Two door laminated ‘push to open’ overhead cupboards above fridge.
Quality by standard, Personalised by choice.
Note: Makes and models are subject to change without notice

Applicances:
900mm Electric Cooktop
900mm Underbench Oven or Freestanding Range
700mm Underbench or 900mm Canopy Rangehood
Stainless Steel Freestanding Dishwasher
Standard Colourboard doors. Choice of colours from either Laminex or Polytec
20mm Quality Stone Benchtops from Builder’s Range

Kitchen tap – sink mixer (chrome)
Kitchen sink – 1 ½ Bowl double bowl drop-in stainless steel sink with drainer
Tiled splashback – up to bottom of kitchen bulkheads
Cupboards and doors – laminated with 1mm ABS edge
Drawers – see detailed kitchen plans for drawer locations
Choice of handles or finger pull for doors and drawers
Overhead cupboards – see our detailed kitchen plans

Chrome flick mixer tapware
Toilet – close coupled, back-to-wall with soft-close seat
Vanity basins – semi-inset or semi-recessed with built-in plug and overflow (as dictated by plan)
Builders range stone benchtops 20mm
Vanity mirror – 850mm high × full length vanity
Shower – recessed and tiled, including 400mm × 400mm shower niche
Shower screens – clear glass Semi-frameless
Towel rail – 600mm double rail and WC holder in chrome
Bathtub – framed white acrylic
Ceiling-mounted shower rose OR rail and hose shower set
45L Laundry Tub in custom built cabinet  with 20mm stone top

Underground 16mm² single-phase power (10 metres from house to connection point)
Telephone NBN Connection and single phone point
Internal power points as per plan Clipsal Slimline
Light points and fittings as per plan - White Downlights
TV points as per plan
Earth leakage circuit breakers (2 included – power and lighting circuits)
Smoke detectors as per plan
3 in 1 exhaust fans to ensuite and bathroom

1200 Front door – choice from standard range
Front entrance lock – Gainsborough Trilock
Aluminium sliding doors and windows
Internal doors – flush panel doors
Garage door – panel lift with 2 remote controls and 1 wall switch
Barrier screens to all sliding doors
Flyscreens to all windows

Built-in robes – white melamine shelf with hanging rail
Built in Pantry and linen – 4 shelves
Broom cupboard – top shelf

Premium Gainsborough lever door handles throughout.
Painted timber skirting boards (68mm × 11mm).
Painted timber architraves (42mm × 11mm).
90mm cove cornice throughout.
Plaster-lined garage.
6mm Villaboard lining to all wet area walls where required.
Ceiling heights as nominated on the approved plans.
Ceiling and roof insulation designed to achieve the required 6-Star Energy Rating (or current NCC equivalent).

Sewer line allowance (10 metres from house to connection point)
Stormwater line allowance (10 metres from house to connection point)
Mains water line allowance (10 metres from house to connection point)
Polyethylene water lines for internal plumbing
150mm gutters

Genuine COLORBOND® fascia and gutter system.
Genuine COLORBOND® roofing selected from the builder's standard colour range.
Roof pitch as detailed on the approved plans.
Roof insulation designed to achieve the required 6-Star Energy Rating (or current NCC equivalent).
Eave widths as shown on the approved plans.

Three-coat premium paint system to all walls throughout the home.
2 Coats to ceilings (Flat White rolled finish)
Gloss finish to skirting boards, architraves and internal doors.

Choice of 450 x 450 cermaic tiles or choice of flooring from the builder's standard range (with upgrade options available)
Quality carpet with premium underlay to bedrooms and media room.

Our Premier Inclusions Schedule outlines the fixtures, fittings, finishes and construction standards Included as the pricing basis for each Project. Each internal selection and any approved upgrades or downgrades will be confirmed during the Selections Process and documented in the Formal Quotation.
Quality by standard, Personalised by choice.
